module_info.docstring: Tests for validator — validate_and_filter_entries + validate_promoted + decay + sweep.

methods.name: test_all_valid_citations_pass_through
methods.docstring: Entries with valid citations remain in the output.

methods.name: test_broken_citation_filters_entry
methods.docstring: Entry with broken citation gets filtered as stale.

methods.name: test_no_citations_keeps_base_confidence
methods.docstring: Entry with no extractable citations keeps base confidence (0.5) and passes.

methods.name: test_mixed_entries
methods.docstring: Mix of valid, broken, and no-citation entries.

methods.name: test_metadata_stored
methods.docstring: Validation records entries and citations in metadata.db.

methods.name: test_transaction_rollback_on_error
methods.docstring: If validation raises, transaction is rolled back.

classes.name: TestRepromotion
classes.docstring: Tests for demoted entries re-entering the validation pipeline.

methods.name: test_demoted_entry_repromotion
methods.docstring: Demoted entry reappears with good citations → reactivated.

methods.name: test_demoted_entry_stays_demoted_if_stale
methods.docstring: Demoted entry reappears with broken citations → stays demoted.

methods.name: test_demoted_entry_no_citations_repromates
methods.docstring: Demoted entry with no citations keeps base confidence (0.5) → reactivated.

methods.name: test_full_lifecycle_decay_to_repromotion
methods.docstring: Full round-trip: validate → sweep/decay → demote → reappear → re-promote.

methods.name: test_valid_promoted_entries
methods.docstring: Promoted entries with valid citations report as healthy.

methods.name: test_stale_promoted_entry
methods.docstring: Promoted entry with broken citation reported as stale.

methods.name: test_missing_target_doc
methods.docstring: Missing target doc gracefully returns empty result.

methods.name: test_no_intermem_markers
methods.docstring: Doc with no intermem markers returns empty result.

methods.name: test_multiple_promoted_entries
methods.docstring: Multiple promoted entries validated independently.

methods.name: test_hash_based_marker
methods.docstring: New hash-based markers <!-- intermem:HASH --> are extracted correctly.

classes.name: TestDecayPenalty
classes.docstring: Tests for the time-based confidence decay function.

methods.name: test_within_14_days_no_penalty
methods.docstring: No decay during the 14-day grace period.

methods.name: test_exactly_14_days_no_penalty
methods.docstring: Day 14 is still within grace period.

methods.name: test_at_15_days_minus_0_1
methods.docstring: Day 15 enters first penalty period: -0.1.

methods.name: test_at_28_days_still_minus_0_1
methods.docstring: Day 28 is still in first penalty period: -0.1 (off-by-one fix).

methods.name: test_at_29_days_minus_0_2
methods.docstring: Day 29 enters second penalty period: -0.2.

methods.name: test_at_42_days_still_minus_0_2
methods.docstring: Day 42 is the end of second penalty period: -0.2.

methods.name: test_at_43_days_minus_0_3
methods.docstring: Day 43 enters third penalty period: -0.3.

methods.name: test_clamps_to_zero
methods.docstring: Very old entry doesn't go negative.

methods.name: test_naive_last_seen_timestamp
methods.docstring: Naive (no TZ) last_seen is treated as UTC without TypeError.

methods.name: test_aware_last_seen_timestamp
methods.docstring: UTC-aware last_seen works correctly.

methods.name: test_corrupt_timestamp_returns_zero
methods.docstring: Invalid timestamp string returns 0.0 (maximally stale).

classes.name: TestSweep
classes.docstring: Tests for the full sweep across all entries.

methods.name: test_sweep_no_decay_fresh_entries
methods.docstring: Fresh entries (just created) are not decayed.

methods.name: test_sweep_with_decay
methods.docstring: Old entries get confidence penalty.

methods.name: test_sweep_stale_streak_increment
methods.docstring: Entry below stale threshold gets stale_streak incremented.

methods.name: test_sweep_stale_streak_reset
methods.docstring: Healthy entry resets stale_streak to 0.

methods.name: test_sweep_single_transaction_rollback
methods.docstring: If sweep crashes mid-way, no partial updates are committed.

methods.name: test_sweep_skips_orphaned_entries
methods.docstring: Orphaned entries are not processed during sweep.

methods.name: test_sweep_skips_demoted_entries
methods.docstring: Demoted entries are not processed during sweep.

methods.name: test_sweep_corrupt_last_seen
methods.docstring: Entry with corrupt last_seen doesn't crash (handled by decay penalty).

methods.name: test_sweep_returns_demotion_candidates
methods.docstring: Entries with stale_streak >= threshold are listed as candidates.

methods.name: test_sweep_crash_recovery_from_journal
methods.docstring: Incomplete demotion in journal is reconciled at sweep start.
